message.content:
<deliberation>
Plan:
- Parse main_entry_nodes and locate each corresponding main_nodes text; note any explicit cross-references in main or referenced_nodes.
- Compare each main node’s combined obligations (including 1-hop references where explicitly cited) to the provided policy chunk.
- Per rule 4, treat any missing information in the policy as Non-Deviation.
- Identify deviations only where the policy text positively narrows, contradicts, or changes execution style relative to the regulatory text, and include exact quotes from both sources per rule 4.1.
- For Article 13(3), the regulation explicitly requires “instructions for use,” while the policy commits to “documentation to customers” and a “Transparency Note,” which is an execution style difference; record as a deviation with quotes.
- For Article 13(8), although it continues the “instructions for use” list, the provided excerpt does not explicitly restate “instructions for use,” so avoid claiming a deviation based on artifact naming due to the strict evidence requirement.
- For REG-091, no regulatory text is provided; per rule 4.1, classify as Non-Deviation.

Cross-references to include:
- REG-039 (Art15(2)) → REG-038 (Art15(1))
- REG-032 (Art13(8)) → Article 14 (REG-033, REG-034, REG-035, REG-036, REG-037) and Article 12 (REG-022, REG-023, REG-024)
- REG-021 (Art11(3)) → Article 97 (REG-074 to REG-079)
- Others have no explicit references in the provided material.

Outcome:
- Deviations found only for REG-027 (Art13(3)) as execution style difference about the required delivery artifact (“instructions for use” vs “documentation/Transparency Note”).
- All other nodes: Non-Deviation due to either alignment or omission (which must be treated as Non-Deviation).
</deliberation>

        "gdpr_quote": "The instructions for use shall contain at least the following information: (a) the identity and the contact details of the provider and, where applicable, of its authorised representative; (b) the characteristics, capabilities and limitations of performance of the high-risk AI system, including: (i) its intended purpose;",
        "policy_quote": "Provide documentation to customers which describes the system's: 1) intended uses, Provide documentation to customers which describes the system's: 2) evidence that the system is fit for purpose for each intended use. When the system is a platform service made available to external customers or partners, include this information in the required Transparency Note.",
